name: Tom Petty
abstract: Thomas Earl Petty (October 20, 1950 – October 2, 2017) was an American singer, songwriter, and guitarist. He was the leader and frontman of the rock bands Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers and Mudcrutch and a member of the late 1980s supergroup the Traveling Wilburys.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Chez
about_quotes.evidence: Tom Petty, did I ever play with Tom Petty? I did a Christmas... Tom Petty released a Christmas song. I’m playing trumpet on it... oh yeah I did.
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Chez interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, February 13, 2019
